name: Xiwang Foodstuffs Co.,Ltd.
summary: Xiwang Foodstuffs Co.,Ltd. produces and sells corn germ oil products in China. Its products primarily include Xiwang corn germ oil and fresh-embryo corn germ oil, as well as sunflower seed oil, olive oil, flaxseed oil, peanut oil, and other oils. The company is based in Binzhou, China.
